message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with new dependencies

Updates Cargo.lock to include new dependencies added in this batch:

pt-core:
- hex: For hexadecimal encoding in identity hashing
- sha2: For SHA-256 hashing in identity validation

pt-telemetry:
- tracing: For structured logging in retention module

These dependencies support the cgroup action system, telemetry
retention, and report generation features added in this commit series.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
